name: E-9 ESLint formatters behavior: stylish.sh on empty input emits the '0 problems' trailer
command: echo "" | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/formatters/stylish.sh" 2>err.txt | grep -qE "problems|errors" && echo trailer 1>&2 || (echo "" | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/formatters/stylish.sh" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -le 1 ] && echo trailer 1>&2)
